# Base R

## Plot

-   Arguments
    -   [type]{.arg-text} - What type of plot should be drawn.
        -   Possible types are:
            -   ["p"]{.arg-text} for points
            -   ["l"]{.arg-text} for lines
            -   ["b"]{.arg-text} for both
            -   ["c"]{.arg-text} for the lines part alone of ["b"]{.arg-text}
            -   ["o"]{.arg-text} for both ‘overplotted’
            -   ["h"]{.arg-text} for ‘histogram’ like (or ‘high-density’) vertical lines
            -   ["s"]{.arg-text} for stair steps
            -   ["S"]{.arg-text} for other steps
            -   ["n"]{.arg-text} for no plotting
